metadata.title: CEFR Language Proficiency Framework
metadata.notes: CEFR (Council of Europe, 2001/2020 Companion Volume). 6 levels × 5 skills = 30 competency nodes.

nodes.title: A1 Listening (Breakthrough)
nodes.description: Listening — Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases at A1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases

nodes.title: A1 Reading (Breakthrough)
nodes.description: Reading — Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases at A1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases

nodes.title: A1 Spoken Interaction (Breakthrough)
nodes.description: Spoken Interaction — Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases at A1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases

nodes.title: A1 Spoken Production (Breakthrough)
nodes.description: Spoken Production — Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases at A1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases

nodes.title: A1 Writing (Breakthrough)
nodes.description: Writing — Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases at A1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases

nodes.title: A2 Listening (Waystage)
nodes.description: Listening — Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance at A2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance

nodes.title: A2 Reading (Waystage)
nodes.description: Reading — Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance at A2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance

nodes.title: A2 Spoken Interaction (Waystage)
nodes.description: Spoken Interaction — Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance at A2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance

nodes.title: A2 Spoken Production (Waystage)
nodes.description: Spoken Production — Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance at A2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance

nodes.title: A2 Writing (Waystage)
nodes.description: Writing — Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance at A2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand sentences and frequently used expressions related to areas of most immediate relevance

nodes.title: B1 Listening (Threshold)
nodes.description: Listening — Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken at B1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken

nodes.title: B1 Reading (Threshold)
nodes.description: Reading — Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken at B1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken

nodes.title: B1 Spoken Interaction (Threshold)
nodes.description: Spoken Interaction — Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken at B1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken

nodes.title: B1 Spoken Production (Threshold)
nodes.description: Spoken Production — Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken at B1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken

nodes.title: B1 Writing (Threshold)
nodes.description: Writing — Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken at B1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can deal with most situations likely to arise while travelling in an area where the language is spoken

nodes.title: B2 Listening (Vantage)
nodes.description: Listening — Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible at B2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible

nodes.title: B2 Reading (Vantage)
nodes.description: Reading — Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible at B2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible

nodes.title: B2 Spoken Interaction (Vantage)
nodes.description: Spoken Interaction — Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible at B2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible

nodes.title: B2 Spoken Production (Vantage)
nodes.description: Spoken Production — Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible at B2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible

nodes.title: B2 Writing (Vantage)
nodes.description: Writing — Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible at B2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can interact with a degree of fluency and spontaneity that makes regular interaction with native speakers possible

nodes.title: C1 Listening (Effective Proficiency)
nodes.description: Listening — Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes at C1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes

nodes.title: C1 Reading (Effective Proficiency)
nodes.description: Reading — Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes at C1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes

nodes.title: C1 Spoken Interaction (Effective Proficiency)
nodes.description: Spoken Interaction — Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes at C1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes

nodes.title: C1 Spoken Production (Effective Proficiency)
nodes.description: Spoken Production — Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes at C1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes

nodes.title: C1 Writing (Effective Proficiency)
nodes.description: Writing — Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes at C1 level.

academic_standards.description: Can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without much searching for expressions; use language flexibly for social, academic, and professional purposes

nodes.title: C2 Listening (Mastery)
nodes.description: Listening — Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently at C2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently

nodes.title: C2 Reading (Mastery)
nodes.description: Reading — Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently at C2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently

nodes.title: C2 Spoken Interaction (Mastery)
nodes.description: Spoken Interaction — Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently at C2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently

nodes.title: C2 Spoken Production (Mastery)
nodes.description: Spoken Production — Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently at C2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently

nodes.title: C2 Writing (Mastery)
nodes.description: Writing — Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently at C2 level.

academic_standards.description: Can understand with ease virtually everything heard or read; summarize information from different sources, reconstructing arguments coherently

edges.rationale: A2 Spoken Interaction requires A1 proficiency
A2 Spoken Production requires A1 proficiency
B1 Spoken Interaction requires A2 proficiency
B1 Spoken Production requires A2 proficiency
B2 Spoken Interaction requires B1 proficiency
B2 Spoken Production requires B1 proficiency
C1 Spoken Interaction requires B2 proficiency
C1 Spoken Production requires B2 proficiency
C2 Spoken Interaction requires C1 proficiency
C2 Spoken Production requires C1 proficiency
